questions.question: In digital IC design, what is the primary purpose of a 'testbench'?
options: To characterize the electrical properties of individual transistors.
To synthesize a behavioral HDL description into a gate-level netlist.
To verify the functional correctness of a designed circuit by applying stimuli and checking outputs.
To physically place and route standard cells on the silicon die.
To generate the GDSII file for manufacturing.

questions.question: What is the primary characteristic of Single Instruction, Multiple Data (SIMD) architecture in computer architecture?
options: Executes multiple distinct instructions simultaneously on a single data stream.
Processes a single instruction on multiple independent data elements concurrently.
Utilizes multiple independent processors, each executing its own instruction stream on its own data.
Allows a single processor to execute instructions from multiple program threads in an interleaved fashion.
Employs specialized hardware to accelerate I/O operations independently of the main CPU.

questions.question: In the physical design flow of an Integrated Circuit, what is the primary goal of 'floorplanning'?
options: To convert the logical gate-level netlist into a physical layout using standard cells.
To optimize the power delivery network for minimal voltage drop across the chip.
To determine the overall chip dimensions, placement of major functional blocks (IP cores), and I/O pins to optimize area, timing, and power.
To generate the final manufacturing masks for etching the silicon layers.
To verify that all timing constraints are met across all operating conditions.

questions.question: In a virtual memory system, what is the primary purpose of the Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB)?
options: To serve as the highest level (L1) of the data cache for frequently accessed instructions.
To store recently used virtual-to-physical address translations to speed up memory access.
To manage the allocation and deallocation of physical memory pages for different processes.
To provide a hardware interface for performing Direct Memory Access (DMA) operations.
To prefetch instructions from main memory into the instruction cache before they are needed.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of FinFET (Fin Field-Effect Transistor) architecture over traditional planar MOSFETs in advanced semiconductor nodes?
options: It eliminates the need for a silicon substrate, allowing for fully transparent circuits.
It offers superior control over the channel, significantly reducing short-channel effects and leakage current.
It simplifies the manufacturing process by reducing the number of lithography steps required.
It operates exclusively on optical signals, enabling much faster data transmission within the chip.
It increases the gate capacitance significantly to improve signal integrity at higher frequencies.
